name: Zucchini-Cheese Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the cubed zucchini, chopped onion, and mashed garlic in butter until they are crisp-tender, stirring frequently.
2. Remove from heat. Sprinkle with flour and salt, then toss well to combine.
3. Stir in evaporated milk, sour cream, and shredded Cheddar cheese until fully incorporated.
4. Transfer the mixture into a shallow 1-quart casserole dish.
5. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
